requirement_topic.en: PSE Mark — Multi-Regime Conformity (DENAN safety + Top Runner energy + J-Moss RoHS marking)
requirement_topic.zh: PSE标志——多制度合格评定（DENAN安全 + 领跑者能效 + J-Moss RoHS标识）
requirement_topic.zht: PSE標誌——多制度合格評定（DENAN安全 + 領跑者能效 + J-Moss RoHS標識）

summary.en: Unlike the EU's single CE mark, Japan has no unified conformity mark; a household refrigerator must satisfy several separate regimes before sale: (1) DENAN (Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act) — the round (◯) PSE mark via conformity confirmation to the DENAN technical standard / J60335-2-24 (refrigerators are Non-specified appliances); (2) the Top Runner Program under the Act on the Rational Use of Energy — weighted-average energy-efficiency target attainment plus the省エネ / Uniform Energy-Saving Label measured to JIS C 9801; (3) J-Moss marking (JIS C 0950) — the Japanese RoHS-style content marking for specified chemical substances, requiring the green/orange 'R' or content-table marking on the product and catalogue; and (4) where wireless connectivity exists, Giteki (技適) type certification under the Radio Act (MIC). EMC for the appliance itself runs through the voluntary VCCI / CISPR-based JIS framework rather than a mandatory directive. Each regime is separately evidenced; the manufacturer or Japan-resident importer compiles the conformity documentation (test records, the business notification to METI, label calculations) and affixes the PSE mark and Japanese-language markings before market placement.
summary.zh: 与欧盟单一CE标志不同，日本没有统一的合格评定标志；家用电冰箱在销售前须满足若干独立制度：（1）DENAN（电气用品安全法）——通过符合DENAN技术标准 / J60335-2-24确认符合性加贴圆形（◯）PSE标志（电冰箱属于非特定电气用品）；（2）《能源使用合理化法》下的领跑者计划——加权平均能效目标达标，并依据JIS C 9801测量制作省エネ / 统一节能标签；（3）J-Moss标识（JIS C 0950）——日本RoHS式特定化学物质含量标识，须在产品及目录上加贴绿色/橙色"R"或含量表标识；（4）在存在无线连接功能时，依据《电波法》（MIC）取得Giteki（技适）型式认证。器具本身的EMC通过自愿性VCCI / 基于CISPR的JIS框架处理，而非强制指令。各制度分别提供证据；制造商或日本境内进口商汇编合格评定文件（检测记录、向METI的业务申报、标签计算）并在投放市场前加贴PSE标志及日文标识。
summary.zht: 與歐盟單一CE標誌不同，日本沒有統一的合格評定標誌；家用電冰箱在銷售前須滿足若干獨立制度：（1）DENAN（電氣用品安全法）——通過符合DENAN技術標準 / J60335-2-24確認符合性加貼圓形（◯）PSE標誌（電冰箱屬於非特定電氣用品）；（2）《能源使用合理化法》下的領跑者計畫——加權平均能效目標達標，並依據JIS C 9801測量製作省エネ / 統一節能標籤；（3）J-Moss標識（JIS C 0950）——日本RoHS式特定化學物質含量標識，須在產品及目錄上加貼綠色/橙色「R」或含量表標識；（4）在存在無線連接功能時，依據《電波法》（MIC）取得Giteki（技適）型式認證。器具本身的EMC通過自願性VCCI / 基於CISPR的JIS框架處理，而非強制指令。各制度分別提供證據；製造商或日本境內進口商彙編合格評定文件（檢測記錄、向METI的業務申報、標籤計算）並在投放市場前加貼PSE標誌及日文標識。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act (電気用品安全法 / DENAN) — PSE mark; safety (J60335-2-24 / JIS C 9335-2-24)
Act on the Rational Use of Energy (省エネ法) — Top Runner Program; energy efficiency + 省エネ / Uniform Energy-Saving Label (JIS C 9801)
JIS C 0950 (J-Moss) — Marking for presence of specified chemical substances for electrical and electronic equipment (Japanese RoHS-style marking)
Radio Act (電波法) — Giteki (技適) type certification via MIC, where wireless connectivity is present
VCCI / CISPR-based JIS — voluntary EMC emission framework for the appliance

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering both safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies (CABs); it does not involve manufacturer self-declaration. Energy labelling (China Energy Label based on GB 12021.2) is a separate mandatory requirement administered by NDRC/SAMR. China's RoHS regime (GB/T 26572 and the Management Methods for Restriction of Hazardous Substances in EEE) requires content marking and a hazardous-substances table. There is no single CCC-equivalent mark covering all of these — CCC covers safety/EMC, the China Energy Label covers energy, and China RoHS marking covers substances, each separately issued and displayed.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得中国强制认证（CCC），涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）两项内容。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构（CAB）审核；制造商无需进行自我声明。能效标识（基于GB 12021.2的中国能效标识）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的独立强制性要求。中国RoHS制度（GB/T 26572及《电器电子产品有害物质限制使用管理办法》）要求含量标识及有害物质表。中国没有单一涵盖上述全部内容的CCC等同标识——CCC涵盖安全/电磁兼容，中国能效标识涵盖能效，中国RoHS标识涵盖物质，各自分别颁发和展示。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得中國強制認證（CCC），涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）兩項內容。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構（CAB）審核；製造商無需進行自我聲明。能效標識（基於GB 12021.2的中國能效標識）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的獨立強制性要求。中國RoHS制度（GB/T 26572及《電器電子產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法》）要求含量標識及有害物質表。中國沒有單一涵蓋上述全部內容的CCC等同標識——CCC涵蓋安全/電磁相容，中國能效標識涵蓋能效，中國RoHS標識涵蓋物質，各自分別頒發和展示。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015
GB/T 26572 + Management Methods for Restriction of Hazardous Substances in EEE (China RoHS) — content marking and hazardous-substances table

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build a complete Japan conformity package from scratch — CCC, China Energy Label, and China RoHS do not substitute for any Japanese requirement: (1) DENAN / PSE — conformity to the DENAN technical standard (J60335-2-24), affixing of the round (◯) PSE mark, and the business notification (事業届出) to METI; (2) Top Runner — weighted-average energy-efficiency attainment and the省エネ / Uniform Energy-Saving Label calculated from JIS C 9801 measurements; (3) J-Moss (JIS C 0950) — the Japanese specified-chemical-substance content marking (green 'R' / orange table) replacing the China RoHS marking; (4) Japanese-language markings, instructions and rating-plate; (5) where wireless is present, Giteki (技適) type certification (SRRC does not transfer); (6) a Japan-resident importer/notifier who files the METI business notification and holds compliance responsibility (see row frigjp-market-002). The conformity confirmation for refrigerators is largely the responsibility of the manufacturer / Japan-resident importer (Non-specified appliance route), with third-party RCAB assessment only mandatory for Specified appliances — but test records must still be retained.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须从头建立完整的日本合规文件包——CCC、中国能效标识和中国RoHS均不能替代任何日本要求：（1）DENAN / PSE——符合DENAN技术标准（J60335-2-24）、加贴圆形（◯）PSE标志，并向METI提交业务申报（事业届出）；（2）领跑者——加权平均能效达标及依据JIS C 9801测量计算的省エネ / 统一节能标签；（3）J-Moss（JIS C 0950）——替代中国RoHS标识的日本特定化学物质含量标识（绿色"R"/橙色表）；（4）日文标识、说明书及铭牌；（5）在存在无线功能时，Giteki（技适）型式认证（SRRC不可转用）；（6）日本境内进口商/申报者，向METI提交业务申报并承担合规责任（详见frigjp-market-002行）。电冰箱的符合性确认在很大程度上由制造商 / 日本境内进口商负责（非特定电气用品路径），仅特定电气用品才强制要求第三方RCAB评定——但检测记录仍须保存。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須從頭建立完整的日本合規文件包——CCC、中國能效標識和中國RoHS均不能替代任何日本要求：（1）DENAN / PSE——符合DENAN技術標準（J60335-2-24）、加貼圓形（◯）PSE標誌，並向METI提交業務申報（事業届出）；（2）領跑者——加權平均能效達標及依據JIS C 9801測量計算的省エネ / 統一節能標籤；（3）J-Moss（JIS C 0950）——替代中國RoHS標識的日本特定化學物質含量標識（綠色「R」/橙色表）；（4）日文標識、說明書及銘牌；（5）在存在無線功能時，Giteki（技適）型式認證（SRRC不可轉用）；（6）日本境內進口商/申報者，向METI提交業務申報並承擔合規責任（詳見frigjp-market-002行）。電冰箱的符合性確認在很大程度上由製造商 / 日本境內進口商負責（非特定電氣用品路徑），僅特定電氣用品才強制要求第三方RCAB評定——但檢測記錄仍須保存。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PSE mark under DENAN, Top Runner energy attainment + 省エネ/Uniform Energy-Saving Label, and J-Moss (JIS C 0950) marking all required before sale in Japan; Giteki (技適) mandatory only where wireless connectivity is present; no single unified conformity mark exists
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display + China RoHS marking required before sale in China

source.publisher: METI (Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry) — DENAN / PSE portal

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Japan has no single CE-equivalent mark: a household refrigerator must separately satisfy DENAN/PSE (safety), the Top Runner Program + 省エネ/Uniform Energy-Saving Label (energy), J-Moss/JIS C 0950 (substances), and — where wireless — Giteki/技適 (radio). Chinese CCC, China Energy Label, and China RoHS are entirely separate systems and substitute for none of these. Manufacturers must build all Japanese compliance documentation, Japanese-language markings, and the METI business notification independently.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 日本没有单一等同于CE的标识：家用电冰箱须分别满足DENAN/PSE（安全）、领跑者计划 + 省エネ/统一节能标签（能效）、J-Moss/JIS C 0950（物质），以及（在有无线时）Giteki/技适（无线）。中国CCC、中国能效标识和中国RoHS是完全独立的制度，均不能替代上述任一项。制造商须独立建立所有日本合规文件、日文标识及METI业务申报。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 日本沒有單一等同於CE的標識：家用電冰箱須分別滿足DENAN/PSE（安全）、領跑者計畫 + 省エネ/統一節能標籤（能效）、J-Moss/JIS C 0950（物質），以及（在有無線時）Giteki/技適（無線）。中國CCC、中國能效標識和中國RoHS是完全獨立的制度，均不能替代上述任一項。製造商須獨立建立所有日本合規文件、日文標識及METI業務申報。

requirement_topic.en: Japan-Resident Importer / Notifier — Business Notification (事業届出) under DENAN + Home Appliance Recycling obligations
requirement_topic.zh: 日本境内进口商/申报者——DENAN业务申报（事业届出）+ 家电回收义务
requirement_topic.zht: 日本境內進口商/申報者——DENAN業務申報（事業届出）+ 家電回收義務

summary.en: Under DENAN, the party that manufactures in Japan or imports electrical appliances into Japan is the regulated 'business operator' (事業者) and must file a business notification (事業届出) with METI within 30 days of starting the business, declaring the product category. This operator must be a Japan-resident legal entity: a foreign manufacturer selling into Japan generally relies on a Japan-resident importer to act as the notifier, conduct the conformity confirmation, perform and retain the required factory/inspection records, and affix the PSE mark. The same Japan-resident operator typically carries the Top Runner reporting obligation as the shipping manufacturer/importer, the energy-saving label responsibility, and — for refrigerators specifically — the recycling-fee and take-back obligations under the Home Appliance Recycling Act (家電リサイクル法), which lists refrigerators/freezers as one of the four covered appliance types. The notifier/importer is the entity that Japanese authorities hold responsible for compliance, market surveillance cooperation, and corrective action (including recall). This role cannot be discharged by a freight forwarder, customs broker, or test laboratory.
summary.zh: 在DENAN下，在日本制造或向日本进口电气用品的一方为受规制的"事业者"（事業者），须在开业后30日内向METI提交业务申报（事業届出），申报产品品类。该经营者须为日本境内法人：外国制造商向日本销售时，一般依赖日本境内进口商充当申报者，进行符合性确认、实施并保存所需的工厂/检查记录，并加贴PSE标志。同一日本境内经营者通常作为出货制造商/进口商承担领跑者报告义务、节能标签责任，并——就电冰箱而言——承担《家电回收法》（家電リサイクル法）下的回收费及回收义务，该法将电冰箱/冷冻箱列为四类受管家电之一。申报者/进口商是日本主管机关追究合规、配合市场监管及采取纠正措施（包括召回）责任的实体。该角色不能由货运代理、报关行或检测机构承担。
summary.zht: 在DENAN下，在日本製造或向日本進口電氣用品的一方為受規制的「事業者」（事業者），須在開業後30日內向METI提交業務申報（事業届出），申報產品品類。該經營者須為日本境內法人：外國製造商向日本銷售時，一般依賴日本境內進口商充當申報者，進行符合性確認、實施並保存所需的工廠/檢查記錄，並加貼PSE標誌。同一日本境內經營者通常作為出貨製造商/進口商承擔領跑者報告義務、節能標籤責任，並——就電冰箱而言——承擔《家電回收法》（家電リサイクル法）下的回收費及回收義務，該法將電冰箱/冷凍箱列為四類受管家電之一。申報者/進口商是日本主管機關追究合規、配合市場監管及採取糾正措施（包括召回）責任的實體。該角色不能由貨運代理、報關行或檢測機構承擔。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act (電気用品安全法 / DENAN) — business notification (事業届出) to METI within 30 days; conformity confirmation and record retention by the business operator
Act on the Rational Use of Energy (省エネ法) — Top Runner reporting obligation borne by the shipping manufacturer/importer
Home Appliance Recycling Act (家電リサイクル法 / Act on Recycling of Specified Kinds of Home Appliances) — refrigerators/freezers covered; recycling-fee and take-back obligations

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring manufacturers of export-bound products to designate a foreign-country resident legal representative responsible for product compliance and market surveillance cooperation. Chinese export manufacturers typically appoint overseas distributors or trading companies on a commercial basis, without a statutory Japan-style importer/notifier obligation. Under the CCC domestic regime, the certification holder is the responsible party for domestic market compliance — this role and obligation does not extend to or satisfy Japanese DENAN business-notification, Top Runner reporting, or Home Appliance Recycling requirements.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口产品制造商指定一名在目的国境内居住、负责产品合规及配合市场监管的法定代表人。中国出口制造商通常以商业形式委任海外经销商或贸易公司，但不存在法定的类日本进口商/申报者义务。在CCC国内制度下，认证持有人为国内市场合规的责任方——该角色和义务不延伸至日本DENAN业务申报、领跑者报告或家电回收要求，亦不能满足后者。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口產品製造商指定一名在目的國境內居住、負責產品合規及配合市場監管的法定代表人。中國出口製造商通常以商業形式委任海外經銷商或貿易公司，但不存在法定的類日本進口商/申報者義務。在CCC國內制度下，認證持有人為國內市場合規的責任方——該角色和義務不延伸至日本DENAN業務申報、領跑者報告或家電回收要求，亦不能滿足後者。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent for the Japanese importer/notifier obligation

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. Chinese refrigerator manufacturers selling into Japan (including via cross-border e-commerce or direct B2B supply) must work through a Japan-resident importer/notifier who files the DENAN business notification (事業届出) with METI, performs and retains the conformity-confirmation records, affixes the PSE mark, carries the Top Runner reporting and energy-saving-label obligations, and — critically for refrigerators — bears the Home Appliance Recycling Act (家電リサイクル法) recycling-fee and take-back obligations. Without a Japan-resident operator fulfilling these roles, the product cannot legally be placed on the Japanese market regardless of any test results. Japanese authorities hold this operator responsible for market surveillance cooperation and corrective action. A logistics provider or customs agent cannot satisfy the notifier role.
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性差距。向日本销售的中国电冰箱制造商（包括通过跨境电商或直接B2B供货）须通过日本境内进口商/申报者运作，由其向METI提交DENAN业务申报（事業届出）、实施并保存符合性确认记录、加贴PSE标志、承担领跑者报告及节能标签义务，并——对电冰箱而言至关重要——承担《家电回收法》（家電リサイクル法）的回收费及回收义务。在没有日本境内经营者履行上述角色的情况下，无论检测结果如何，产品均不得合法投放日本市场。日本主管机关追究该经营者配合市场监管及采取纠正措施的责任。物流服务商或报关行不能承担申报者角色。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性差距。向日本銷售的中國電冰箱製造商（包括透過跨境電商或直接B2B供貨）須通過日本境內進口商/申報者運作，由其向METI提交DENAN業務申報（事業届出）、實施並保存符合性確認記錄、加貼PSE標誌、承擔領跑者報告及節能標籤義務，並——對電冰箱而言至關重要——承擔《家電回收法》（家電リサイクル法）的回收費及回收義務。在沒有日本境內經營者履行上述角色的情況下，無論檢測結果如何，產品均不得合法投放日本市場。日本主管機關追究該經營者配合市場監管及採取糾正措施的責任。物流服務商或報關行不能承擔申報者角色。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a Japan-resident importer/notifier filing the DENAN business notification (事業届出) to METI is required before market placement; this operator also bears Top Runner reporting and Home Appliance Recycling Act (家電リサイクル法) obligations for refrigerators
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation to appoint a Japan-resident importer/notifier under Chinese law

source.publisher: METI (Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry) — DENAN business notification (事業届出) guidance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese refrigerator manufacturers selling into Japan must work through a Japan-resident importer/notifier who files the DENAN business notification (事業届出) with METI, holds the conformity-confirmation and PSE responsibility, carries Top Runner reporting, and — for refrigerators — bears Home Appliance Recycling Act (家電リサイクル法) obligations. This is a hard legal gate: without a compliant Japan-resident operator, the product cannot be lawfully placed on the Japanese market, and Japanese authorities can order withdrawal and impose penalties on the operator.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 向日本销售的中国电冰箱制造商须通过日本境内进口商/申报者运作，由其向METI提交DENAN业务申报（事業届出）、承担符合性确认及PSE责任、承担领跑者报告，并——对电冰箱而言——承担《家电回收法》（家電リサイクル法）义务。这是一项强制性法律门槛：在没有合规的日本境内经营者的情况下，产品不得合法投放日本市场，日本主管机关可命令撤回并对经营者处以处罚。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 向日本銷售的中國電冰箱製造商須通過日本境內進口商/申報者運作，由其向METI提交DENAN業務申報（事業届出）、承擔符合性確認及PSE責任、承擔領跑者報告，並——對電冰箱而言——承擔《家電回收法》（家電リサイクル法）義務。這是一項強制性法律門檻：在沒有合規的日本境內經營者的情況下，產品不得合法投放日本市場，日本主管機關可命令撤回並對經營者處以處罰。
